title: Apply UI/UX Design with Figma for Modern Interfaces
description:
Learners will be able to apply core UI/UX design principles, create visually engaging interfaces, build interactive prototypes, and design responsive layouts using Figma. This course guides learners step by step from foundational design concepts to advanced, real-world UI design workflows.

Throughout the course, learners will gain hands-on experience with Figma’s essential tools, including frames, visual elements, images, symbols, and prototypes. They will design social media creatives, website layouts, and responsive pages while learning how to structure content, establish visual hierarchy, and improve usability. The course also emphasizes modern design practices such as reusability, scalability, and collaboration using Figma Community resources.

What makes this course unique is its practical, design-first approach that connects theory directly to application. Instead of focusing only on tools, learners understand why design decisions matter and how to apply them effectively across platforms and screen sizes. By the end of the course, learners will be equipped with job-ready UI/UX design skills, a strong understanding of responsive and interactive design, and the confidence to create professional-quality interfaces using Figma.
